The '''Scarab Mark VI assassin droid''' was an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] designed to look like a small insect. It was one of the eighteen variants that comprised [[Sienar Intelligence Systems/Legends|Sienar Intelligence Systems']] [[scarab droid]] line. They were designed to kill through stealth, not brute force.<ref name="EGTD" />

It had enough capacity for 2 uses. The droid had magnetic feet which allowed it to climb metallic surfaces and advanced sensors that would allow it to track a specific target if it was supplied with a sample of biological fluid.

Scarab Mark VI [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were used in the assassination attempt on [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] during his stay on [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]].<ref name="EGTD" />
